_comment: fields whose LIVE value is deliberately allowed to differ from the committed
manifest, so the gate does not fail on an intentional live-only value.
branchProtection / tagRuleset / baselineRuleset and <field> is a TOP-LEVEL key
of that object (allowlisting a top-level key also suppresses any nested drift
under it). Every entry MUST carry a rationale comment — a silent allowlist
Empty by design: the committed manifests are expected to match live exactly.
Add an entry only for a documented, deliberate live-only difference.
